legacy.content:
# Phase 40-01 Summary - Content Pack Authoring Flow
## Completed - Added `POST /api/content-packs/build-bundle` route: - loads base `public/game/content-pack.bundle.v1.json` - applies `spaceVectorsPatch` (`featureSchema`, `modelSchemas`) - recomputes per-pack + overall SHA256 hashes - returns generated full bundle JSON - Extended Space Explorer Model Schema Builder with: - model preset apply flow - local draft save/load/delete (localStorage) - restore-base action - schema validation panel - base-vs-current diff summary - full bundle download action via new API route - Added unit test: `docs-site/tests/unit/content-pack-bundle-build-route.test.ts`.
## Verification - `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:unit` passed.
## Follow-up - Add publish helper to move built bundles into release artifacts. - Add docs/report generation linkage for newly built bundles.
